steps.title: Identify what needs emphasizing
steps.content: The question asks for emphasis on when Argentum debuted (2018) and where it debuted (New York City). These are the two details that must stand out.

steps.title: Select the choice that highlights both
steps.content:
Choice C directly places the year and location at the sentence's start: “In 2018, Grimanesa Amoros debuted Argentum in New York City, New York.” The other three either mention only one detail, bury it within other information, or position it awkwardly.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
